auth.tagline: A prediction league for the 2026 World Cup with your friends. Virtual points, just for fun.

league.title: Leagues
league.noLeagues: You're not in any league yet.
league.noLeaguesHint: Create a league or join with a code. You start each league with 1,000 GP.
league.slotsFull: Your slots are full. Leave a league from settings to join a new one.

matches.bracketHint: Fill out the bracket and share it as an image
matches.noMatchesHint: Matches appear here once the fixture updates.

slip.empty: Slip is empty. Pick odds from matches to start.
slip.rule: All selections must win for the slip to pay out. Predictions close when the match starts.

feed.emptyHint: Write the first message to start the chat.

leaderboard.title: Standings
leaderboard.tapHint: Tap a player to view their slips.

store.vipDesc: Ad-free experience + VIP badge on your profile
store.vipPerk2: VIP badge next to your name
store.vipPerk3: No gameplay advantage — fair competition preserved
store.vipStoreNote: Real purchases are made through the App Store / Google Play.
store.framesDesc: Cosmetic only. Shown on the leaderboard and your profile.
store.disclaimer: BetFellas is purely for entertainment. GP is not real money; it cannot be bought or cashed out.

profile.noOpen: No open slips. Pick odds from matches to build one.

settings.title: Settings
settings.frameRemoveHint: GP is not refunded if removed
settings.leaveHint: Your points and pending slips are deleted
settings.leaveConfirm: Are you sure? All your points and open slips in this league are permanently lost.
settings.deleteHint: Your profile, slips and all data are permanently deleted
settings.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Your points, slips and account across all leagues will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
settings.nameTaken: That name is taken, try another.

bracket.title: Champion prediction
bracket.hint: Place teams into the Round of 32 slots by group rules, then tap the team advancing each round.

age.title: Verify your age
age.body: BetFellas is a simulated prediction game played with real match odds. Its content is intended for users aged 18 and over only.
age.noMoney: No real money is involved. In-game points (GP) cannot be purchased or cashed out.
age.denied: Sorry, BetFellas is for users aged 18 and over.
age.agree: By continuing you agree to the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
